scripts.build:js: mkdir -p dist/js && for f in src/js/*.js; do terser "$f" --compress --mangle -o "dist/js/$(basename $f)" || exit 1; done
scripts.build:images: mkdir -p dist/images && cp -r src/images/. dist/images && npx imagemin 'src/images/*.jpg' 'src/images/*.png' --out-dir=dist/images && find dist/images -name '*.svg' | xargs -r npx svgo
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:fonts && npm run build:images
scripts.watch:images: SHELL=/bin/bash chokidar 'src/images/**/*' -c 'cp {path} dist/images/$(basename {path}); case {path} in *.jpg|*.png) npx imagemin {path} --out-dir=dist/images ;; *.svg) npx svgo dist/images/$(basename {path}) ;; esac'
scripts.watch: concurrently "npm run watch:css" "npm run watch:js" "npm run watch:fonts" "npm run watch:images"
